<!-- generated by /context-docs on 2026-05-20 -->
# Data Flow

## Inputs

### From the local filesystem (`1_input/wXX/`)
Each epidemiological week gets its own subdirectory (e.g. `1_input/w37/`) containing four subdirs:

| Subdir | Content | Format |
|--------|---------|--------|
| `datasheet/` | Pool-level surveillance records (trap, zone, species, totals) | `.xlsx` |
| `pcr/` | Quantstudio3 qPCR quantification results | `.xls` |
| `platemap/` | Well-position ‚Üí CSU pool ID mapping | `.csv` |
| `all_species/` | Trap-level species count data | `.xlsx` |

### From Google Drive (downloaded by pipeline if `--download T`)

| Google Sheet ID | Content |
|-----------------|---------|
| `12Mf-w9I9NH...` | Master WNV-S database (all historical pool results) |
| `15icsYx5Skm...` | Culex species database |
| `1G5UcRmcVsV...` | Fort Collins trap metadata (coordinates, status) |
| `1bSMYQ4bZ9u...` | qPCR standards reference curves |
| `amp_inconclusive_negatives` | Manual corrections for ambiguous PCR results |

Also: `RMRP_database.csv` (bird surveillance data, `1_input/`)

---

## Pipeline Stages

1. **Load config** ‚Äî `read_latest("config/config_weekly_settings/")` loads the `.RData` snapshot created by `config/config_weekly.R`. All downstream parameters (week, year, thresholds, paths, zone levels) flow from this object.

2. **Download Google Sheets** (if `download = TRUE`) ‚Äî `gdrive_download()` / `gsheet_pull_prompt()` pull the master database, trap metadata, and standards sheets into `1_input/`.

3. **Read PCR data** ‚Äî `read_pcr(dir_pcr, sheet)` ‚Üí raw Quantstudio3 data.frame.

4. **Clean PCR data** ‚Äî `clean_pcr(df, y_pattern, w_pattern, p_pattern)` ‚Üí extracts year/week/plate from filename, converts Cq ‚Üí numeric, calculates copy number using standard curve, assigns `test_code`.

5. **Separate standards** ‚Äî `clean_standards(df, std_pattern)` ‚Üí splits out qPCR controls/standards for curve validation.

6. **Read & clean platemap** ‚Äî `read_platemap()` + `clean_platemap()` ‚Üí well-position to CSU pool ID lookup table.

7. **Merge PCR + platemap** ‚Äî `merge_pcr_platemap(pcr, platemap, copy_threshold)` ‚Üí attaches pool identities to each Cq/copy measurement; applies positivity threshold (`cp_threshold = 500`).

8. **Read & clean datasheet** ‚Äî `read_list(dir_datasheet)` + `wnv_s_clean()` ‚Üí standardised pool-level surveillance records with zone factor levels enforced.

9. **Three-way merge** ‚Äî `merge_4_database(datasheet, cq, platemap)` ‚Üí single pool-level record joining trap metadata + PCR results + pool IDs; validates coverage.

10. **Update master database** (if `update = TRUE`) ‚Äî `update_gsheet(new_rows, key_database_gsheet)` ‚Üí appends new week's results to Google Sheet.

11. **Read & clean species counts** ‚Äî `read_list(dir_all_spp)` + `wnv_s_clean()` ‚Üí trap-level species abundance records.

12. **Complete trap grid** ‚Äî `trap_complete(df, zone_complete)` ‚Üí fills zero-abundance rows for traps that were active but caught nothing (ensures complete panel for statistics).

13. **Calculate abundance** ‚Äî `calc_abund(df, grp_vars, spp_keep, rm_zone)` ‚Üí count/trap-night with 95% CI by zone √ó species √ó week.

14. **Calculate PIR** ‚Äî `calc_pir(df, grp_vars, zone_complete)` ‚Üí pooled infection rate (MLE, Firth's method) with bootstrap CI via `PooledInfRate::pIR`.

15. **Calculate Virus Index** ‚Äî `calc_vi(abund, pir, grp_vars)` ‚Üí VI = infection_rate √ó abundance, the primary WNV risk metric.

16. **Build historical comparisons** ‚Äî `clean_long_hx(ytd, hx, grp_var)` ‚Üí reshapes YTD + multi-year history (2017‚Äìpresent) for trend plots.

17. **Generate plots** ‚Äî `plot_pcr()`, `plot_hx()`, `plot_pools()` ‚Üí PNG files saved to `3_output/plots/y{year}_w{week}/`.

18. **Export Excel report** ‚Äî `openxlsx` writes `3_output/weekly_report_output.xlsx` with formatted sheets for epidemiologists.

19. **Export CSVs** ‚Äî `table1a/1b.csv` (abundance + historical), `table2a/2b.csv` (PIR + historical), `table3a/3b.csv` (VI + historical), `zone_stats.csv`, `rmrp_2025_wXX.csv`.

---

## Outputs

| Path | Description |
|------|-------------|
| `3_output/weekly_report_output.xlsx` | Primary deliverable ‚Äî formatted multi-sheet Excel report |
| `3_output/table1a.csv` | Current-week abundance by zone/species |
| `3_output/table1b_hx_vi.csv` | Historical VI comparison |
| `3_output/table2a.csv` | Current-week PIR by zone/species |
| `3_output/table2b_hx_abund.csv` | Historical abundance comparison |
| `3_output/table3a.csv` | Current-week VI by zone/species |
| `3_output/table3b_hx_pir.csv` | Historical PIR comparison |
| `3_output/zone_stats.csv` | Zone-level summary statistics |
| `3_output/rmrp_2025_wXX.csv` | Bird surveillance data export |
| `3_output/plots/y{year}_w{week}/pcr_plot.png` | qPCR scatter: Cq vs. copies |
| `3_output/plots/y{year}_w{week}/hx_plot_all.png` | Historical vs. current trend lines |
| `3_output/plots/y{year}_w{week}/trap_status.png` | Active/inactive trap summary |

---

## Intermediate Cache Objects (`2_mid/`)

Named by `y{year}_w{week}_` prefix, so multiple weeks can coexist:

| File pattern | Contents |
|-------------|---------|
| `y{yr}_w{wk}_datasheet.csv` | Cleaned pool-level surveillance datasheet |
| `y{yr}_w{wk}_pcr_clean.RData` | Cleaned PCR Cq/copy data |
| `y{yr}_w{wk}_platemap_clean.RData` | Cleaned well-to-pool-ID map |
| `y{yr}_w{wk}_cq_data.RData` | Merged PCR + platemap result |
| `y{yr}_w{wk}_all_species_active_trap.RData` | Cleaned abundance input |
| `y{yr}_w{wk}_pools.RData` | Pool-level test result summary |
| `y{yr}_w{wk}_database_new.RData` | Combined pool data for this week |
| `y{yr}_w{wk}_trap_status.png` | Trap deployment summary figure |
| `config_weekly_settings/y{yr}_w{wk}_*.RData` | Config snapshot (in `config/`) |
